hero.description: Bridging centuries of tradition with the possibilities of the future. An immersive digital sanctuary for seekers of knowledge.

mainCard.title: Authentic Scholarship
mainCard.description: Our curriculum is meticulously developed by world-renowned scholars who bridge traditional knowledge with modern context.

topRight.title: Modern Accessibility
topRight.description: A seamless learning experience accessible on any device, anywhere in the world.

bottomLeft.title: Spiritual Growth
bottomLeft.description: A holistic approach focused on the purification of character and the soul.

bottomRight.title: Community-Centric
bottomRight.description: Join a global network of students and mentors dedicated to lifelong learning and spiritual excellence.

tradition.title: Tradition
tradition.description: Rooted in authentic classical scholarship, preserving the chains of narration and the purity of sacred knowledge.

innovation.title: Innovation
innovation.description: Utilizing cutting-edge cognitive science to make learning intuitive, engaging, and highly effective.

accessibility.title: Accessibility
accessibility.description: Breaking geographical barriers, ensuring that quality Islamic education is available to every home globally.

features.title: Interactive Learning
features.subtitle: A modern toolkit designed to help you master sacred knowledge with meditative focus.

mainCard.title: Memorize Decks
mainCard.description: Master knowledge with smart, spaced-repetition flashcards designed for long-term retention.

progressTracking.title: Progress Tracking
progressTracking.description: Detailed analytics to visualize your spiritual and academic growth.

partnership.quote: "Together, we can preserve and propagate sacred knowledge for the next generation."
partnership.title: Partnership Inquiry
partnership.description: We are looking for visionary scholars and established traditional institutes to join our early adopter program. Let's work together to digitize your curriculum and reach a global audience.

institutionSupport.title: Institution Support
institutionSupport.description: Get early access to our platform tools to host your own courses and manage students.

scholarNetwork.title: Scholar Network
scholarNetwork.description: Collaborate with our team to shape the pedagogical tools for the digital age.

waitlist.title: Be the First to Know
waitlist.description: Our sanctuary for learning is currently under active development. Join our waitlist for development updates and exclusive pre-launch benefits.

footer.tagline: Empowering the Ummah through accessible, authentic, and modern Islamic education. Join our journey toward the future of learning.

development.title: Development
development.description: Follow our progress as we build the sanctuary of knowledge.
